2399470.name: 9th Land
2399470.description:
A mysterious new continent has emerged from the waters of the Pacific. The first adventurers who have explored it, speak of magnificent landscapes, lush forests, exotic animals and plants. An unknown civilization's ancient ruins await the most intrepid settlers.

Families worldwide will land together in a new fantasy world, farming virgin lands of great beauty, exploring ancient dungeons, and obtaining legendary items to trade with. They will compete with other families for respect and recognition of their achievements to be part of the 9th Land's history.
2399470.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
